## Definition of Done (per blueprint §24)

- [ ] Title cites task ID
- [ ] CI green: lint, typecheck, unit, build
- [ ] Perf regression gate green (or N/A — no canvas/render touched)
- [ ] If `packages/*` public API changed: TSDoc + example updated
- [ ] If a manifest schema changed: Zod schema diff included
- [ ] If a budget moved: `Docs/TRACE_BLUEPRINT.md` §16 updated in this PR
- [ ] Manually verified on desktop **and** mobile preview
- [ ] Reviewed by ≥ 1 other engineer in the area
